name: Dinah Shore's Trifle
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix jam with liqueur.
2. Spread the mixture on the cake sides.
3. Assemble and cut into squares.
4. Place half of the custard in the bottom of a bowl.
5. Top with half of the cake.
6. Press the layers together.
7. Add cherries, more custard, more cake, mash, and additional cherries.
8. Finish with whipped cream and sprinkle almonds on top.
